hero.subtext: We design architecture that moves between aesthetics, sustainability, and the human experience.

philosophy.headline: Designing space, shaping life, building futures.
philosophy.body: Architecture is never an end in itself. It is the medium through which we build places where emotions are lived, identities expressed, and futures imagined.

pillars.p1_desc: Each project begins with the land it stands on and the air it breathes.
pillars.p2_desc: Architecture must carry the mark of those who inhabit it.
pillars.p3_desc: Every dimension is calibrated to the body, the gaze, and the gesture.

about.label: Founder & Principal Architect
about.bio: Doris Alberti founded Progetto Habitat in Verona after fifteen years of practice across Italy, Portugal, and Japan. Her work sits at the intersection of bioarchitecture, material honesty, and the quiet poetry of everyday space.

contact.subtext: Every great project begins with a conversation. Tell us your vision and let's find out how we can shape it into something lasting.

form.message_placeholder: Describe the project, scale, location, timeline…
form.success_body: We've received your message and will be in touch shortly.
form.error_message: Please tell us about your project

footer.tagline: Architecture rooted in place, shaped by nature, built to endure.
